## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## SDLC Checklist

- [ ] Feature scope documented
- [ ] Threat model updated (if new attack surface)
- [ ] OWASP impact reviewed
- [ ] Lint and typecheck pass
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Security-sensitive code reviewed

## Test Evidence

List commands and outcomes.

## Security Notes

Document auth, validation, or data handling changes.
